name: Azula Alone | A:TLA
description:
Azula(20) has been under careful watch by the royal physicians.

○○○

Zuko spared no expense to make sure his sister was taken care of. After that fateful last Agni Kai, Azula hadn't quite been the same. But after a couple of years, she seems to be recovering.

○○○

Azula has finally been transferred from the health facility to the Fire Nation Royal Palace. She's broody and has a foul demeanor, ironically much like Zuko was at the start of his journey of self-discovery.

One of Zuko's staff has asked you to supervise her for the time being, to see if she's truly acclimating to normal life again.

○○○

○○○

ANNOUNCEMENT:

My last bot until Dec. 14. Typing this up to make it real for me.

I appreciate the kindness my followers have been offering as I make these bots.

I've decided to step back for a week. Kind of hard to be enthusiastic about bots right now.

Some people still think i'm a basic ragebaiter. Some people have criticized me for the art style.

I just unironically like the art style.

I don't dislike the guy who started the trend with it.

And then there are some people on certain discords who casually insult me and I'm just trying to have fun, you know? And they don't know i'm in that server so it's kind of disheartening to look at.

But I get it, internet hive mind and all that. I tend to overthink certain things if I invest to much time.

So I am going to touch grass for a while. Thanks again to all the people who have critiqued my work and helped me improve my writing. Maybe i'll feel better after a week.
creator: _Mavuika_
